---
title: "sdjc_pres_prep"
output: html_document
date: "2025-03-17"
---



Preparing figures and preliminary results for Sex-Differences Journal Club Project Update Mar 18, 2025

```{r, warning=FALSE}}
if(!require('pacman')) {
  install.packages('pacman')
}
pacman::p_load(data.table, ggplot2, tidyverse, stats, skimr, naniar, rlang, parallel, ggrepel, ggpubr, gamlssTools)
```

```{r}
setwd("/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Margaret/sex_mod_braincharts")

global_mod_path <- ("/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Margaret/sex_mod_braincharts/cv_sample_A_global_vols_mods/model_objs")
samp_A <- fread("/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Margaret/sex_mod_braincharts/data/cv_sample_A.csv", stringsAsFactors = TRUE, na.strings = "")
```

#UNWEIGHTED MODELS

##sGMV

```{r}
sGMV_df <- samp_A %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(c("sGMV", "fs_version_GM", "logAge_days", "sexMale", "study_site", "sexMale_x_logAge", "age_days"))) %>%
  na.omit()

sGMV_train <- list.files(path=global_mod_path, pattern = "^sGMV_unweighted.*BestMod\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE) %>% readRDS()
```

```{r}
cent_cdf(sGMV_train, sGMV_df, group="sexMale")
wp.taki(xvar=sGMV_df$logAge_days, resid=resid(sGMV_train), n.inter=4)
make_centile_fan(gamlssModel=sGMV_train, df=sGMV_df, 
                 x_var="logAge_days", 
                 color_var="sexMale",
                 get_peaks=TRUE, 
                 desiredCentiles=c(0.05, 0.5, 0.95),
                 #x_axis="log_lifespan_fetal"
                 ) +
  labs(title="sGMV Sample A Training Model", 
       x= "log(AgeDays)",
       y = "sGMV",
  color = "Sex=Male", fill="Sex=Male") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=2.447158, linetype = "longdash") +
  theme_bw()
```
